faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Glendale, Queens?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Glendale typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Glendale homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Glendale homes through roof vents, gaps in soffits, damaged fascia boards, and openings around chimneys. They can squeeze through holes as small as 1.5 inches and often chew through weak spots in wood or aluminum to create larger entry points. Our inspection identifies all vulnerable areas specific to your property.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York wildlife regulations. Once captured, squirrels are relocated according to state guidelines. We never use poisons or lethal traps, and our exclusion techniques prevent future entry without harming animals.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Glendale?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Glendale are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. Initial trapping typically takes 2-5 days, followed by exclusion work and entry point sealing. We also offer same-day emergency services for urgent situations and provide follow-up inspections to ensure complete removal.
